properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14 v15 v16

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Nothing can separate Even if I ran away Your love never fails

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know I still make mistakes But You have new mercies for me everyday Your love never fails

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You stay the same through the ages Your love never changes And may be pain in the night But joy comes in the morning

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And when the oceans rage I don't have to be afraid Because I know that You love me Your love never fails

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The wind is strong and the water's deep I'm not alone in these open seas 'Cause Your love never fails

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The chasm is far too wide I never thought I'd reach the other side 'Cause Your love never fails

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: 'Cause you stay the same through the ages Your love never changes There may be pain in the night But joy comes in the morning

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And when the oceans rage I don't have to be afraid Because I know that You love me Oh no, love never fails

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: 'Cause You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: 'Cause you stay 'Cause you stay the same through the ages Your love never changes It may be pain in the night But joy comes in the morning

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: And when the oceans rage I don't have to be afraid Because I know that You love me

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make, you make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good You make all things work together for my good 'Cause You make all things work together for my good

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: 'Cause you stay the same through the ages Your love never changes It may be pain in the night But joy comes in the morning

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: And when the oceans rage I don't have to be afraid Because I know that You love me
